tenant_health.summary: Checkout API is degraded after a recent deployment. Error rate and latency are above tenant SLO.

logs: checkout-api error: TypeError reading feature flag schema v3
checkout-api warning: elevated 5xx responses after deploy api-2026.04.20-1421
gateway warning: upstream checkout-api p99 latency above 2s

workers.notes: Workers are healthy; symptoms are isolated to API pods.

hypothesis.description: A recent checkout-api deployment introduced a schema handling regression.
evidence: Logs show feature flag schema exceptions
Workers are healthy, reducing likelihood of queue processing failure

action.label: Rollback checkout-api from api-2026.04.20-1421 to api-2026.04.19-0915

verification.summary: Checkout API recovered after rollback. Error rate and p99 latency returned within SLO.

tenant_health.summary: Background processing is delayed because one worker is unhealthy.

logs: analytics-worker-07 error: heartbeat missed for 180 seconds
analytics-worker-07 error: failed to renew lease for partition tenant-events-3
scheduler warning: queue age exceeds 15 minutes

workers.notes: One worker is missing heartbeats and holding a queue partition lease.

hypothesis.description: analytics-worker-07 is wedged and blocking queue partition processing.
evidence: Logs show missed heartbeats and lease renewal errors
Queue depth is rising while API metrics remain mostly stable

action.label: Restart analytics-worker-07 to release the stuck partition lease

verification.summary: Worker restart restored heartbeats and queue depth is draining.

tenant_health.summary: Inference requests are delayed by an overloaded primary model pool.

logs: router warning: primary model pool admission queue saturated
inference-api warning: request timed out waiting for model slot
router info: standby pool available in same region

workers.notes: Workers and API pods are healthy. Bottleneck is isolated to model pool capacity.

hypothesis.description: The primary model pool is saturated and requests should be failed over to standby capacity.

action.label: Fail over tenant inference route to the standby model pool

verification.summary: Route failover reduced model queue depth and restored inference latency.
